data.name: Users_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, Email, FirstName, LastName, LoyaltyPoints, AvatarURL, PasswordHash, MFAType, TFASecret, IsVerified, Status, RoleId, LastLoginAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Users

data.name: Users_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, Email, FirstName, LastName, LoyaltyPoints, AvatarURL, PasswordHash, MFAType, TFASecret, IsVerified, Status, RoleId, LastLoginAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Users WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Users_SelectByEmail
data.value: SELECT u.Id, u.Email, u.PasswordHash, u.FirstName, u.LastName, u.IsVerified, u.Status, u.RoleId, r.Name AS RoleName FROM Users u INNER JOIN Roles r ON r.Id = u.RoleId WHERE u.Email = @Email

data.name: Users_EmailExists
data.value: SELECT CAST(CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Users WHERE Email = @Email ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BIT)

data.name: Users_Insert
Users_Update
data.value: UPDATE Users SET Email = @Email, FirstName = @FirstName, LastName = @LastName, LoyaltyPoints = @LoyaltyPoints, AvatarURL = @AvatarURL, PasswordHash = @PasswordHash, MFAType = @MFAType, TFASecret = @TFASecret, IsVerified = @IsVerified, Status = @Status, RoleId = @RoleId, LastLoginAt = @LastLoginAt, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Users_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM Users WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Users_UpdateLastLogin
data.value: UPDATE Users SET LastLoginAt = @LastLoginAt, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @UserId

data.name: Hotels_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, Name, Country, City, Street, PostalCode, PhoneNumber, Email, Status, Approved, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Hotels

data.name: Hotels_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, Name, Country, City, Street, PostalCode, PhoneNumber, Email, Status, Approved, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Hotels WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Hotels_Insert
Hotels_Update
data.value: UPDATE Hotels SET Name = @Name, Country = @Country, City = @City, Street = @Street, PostalCode = @PostalCode, PhoneNumber = @PhoneNumber, Email = @Email, Status = @Status, Approved = @Approved, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Hotels_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM Hotels WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Conveniences_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, Name FROM Conveniences

data.name: Conveniences_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, Name FROM Conveniences WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Conveniences_Insert
Conveniences_Update
data.value: UPDATE Conveniences SET Name = @Name WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Conveniences_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM Conveniences WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelConveniences_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, ConvenienceId FROM HotelConveniences

data.name: HotelConveniences_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, ConvenienceId FROM HotelConveniences WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelConveniences_SelectByHotelId
data.value: SELECT hc.Id, hc.HotelId, hc.ConvenienceId FROM HotelConveniences hc WHERE hc.HotelId = @HotelId

data.name: HotelConveniences_Insert
HotelConveniences_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelConveniences WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelConveniences_DeleteByHotelAndConvenience
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelConveniences WHERE HotelId = @HotelId AND ConvenienceId = @ConvenienceId

data.name: HotelRooms_SelectAll
data.value:
SELECT
res.[Id], res.[Description], res.[Price], res.[RoomNo], res.[Floor], res.[BedCount], res.[Capacity],
hotel.[Id] AS HotelId, hotel.[Name]
FROM [HotelRooms] res INNER JOIN [Hotels] hotel ON res.[hotelId] = hotel.[Id];

data.name: HotelRooms_SelectById
data.value:
SELECT
res.[Id], res.[Description], res.[Price], res.[RoomNo], res.[Floor], res.[BedCount], res.[Capacity],
hotel.[Id] AS HotelId, hotel.[Name]
FROM [HotelRooms] res INNER JOIN [Hotels] hotel ON res.[hotelId] = hotel.[Id] WHERE res.[Id] = @Id;

data.name: HotelRooms_SelectByHotelId
data.value:
SELECT
res.[Id], res.[Description], res.[Price], res.[RoomNo], res.[Floor], res.[BedCount], res.[Capacity],
hotel.[Id] AS HotelId, hotel.[Name]
FROM [HotelRooms] res INNER JOIN [Hotels] hotel ON res.[HotelId] = hotel.[Id] WHERE hotel.[Id] = @Id

data.name: HotelRooms_Insert
HotelRooms_Update
data.value: UPDATE HotelRooms SET HotelId = @HotelId, Description = @Description, Price = @Price, RoomNo = @RoomNo, Floor = @Floor, BedCount = @BedCount, Capacity = @Capacity, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRooms_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelRooms WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRoomConveniences_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelRoomId, ConvenienceId FROM HotelRoomConveniences

data.name: HotelRoomConveniences_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelRoomId, ConvenienceId FROM HotelRoomConveniences WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRoomConveniences_SelectByRoomId
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelRoomId, ConvenienceId FROM HotelRoomConveniences WHERE HotelRoomId = @HotelRoomId

data.name: HotelRoomConveniences_Insert
HotelRoomConveniences_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelRoomConveniences WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRoomConveniences_DeleteByRoomAndConvenience
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelRoomConveniences WHERE HotelRoomId = @HotelRoomId AND ConvenienceId = @ConvenienceId

data.name: HotelReservations_SelectById
data.value:
SELECT res.[Id], res.[CheckIn], res.[CheckOut],
h.[Id] AS HotelId, h.[Name], h.[Country], h.[City], h.[Street], h.[PostalCode], h.[PhoneNumber], h.[Email],
u.[Id] AS UserId, u.[Email], u.[FirstName], u.[LastName],
rm.[Id] AS RoomId, rm.[Description], rm.[Price], rm.[RoomNo], rm.[Floor], rm.[BedCount], rm.[Capacity]
FROM [HotelReservation] res INNER JOIN [Hotels] h ON res.[HotelID] = h.[Id] INNER JOIN [Users] u ON res.[UserID] = u.[Id] INNER JOIN [HotelRooms] rm ON res.[RoomID] = rm.[Id] WHERE res.[Id] = @Id;

data.name: HotelReservations_SelectByUserId
data.value:
SELECT res.[Id], res.[CheckIn], res.[CheckOut],
h.[Id] AS HotelId, h.[Name], h.[Country], h.[City], h.[Street], h.[PostalCode], h.[PhoneNumber], h.[Email],
u.[Id] AS UserId, u.[Email], u.[FirstName], u.[LastName],
rm.[Id] AS RoomId, rm.[Description], rm.[Price], rm.[RoomNo], rm.[Floor], rm.[BedCount], rm.[Capacity]
FROM [HotelReservation] res INNER JOIN [Hotels] h ON res.[HotelID] = h.[Id] INNER JOIN [Users] u ON res.[UserID] = u.[Id] INNER JOIN [HotelRooms] rm ON res.[RoomID] = rm.[Id] WHERE res.[UserID] = @UserId

data.name: HotelReservations_SelectByHotelId
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, UserId, RoomId, CheckIn, CheckOut, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM HotelReservation WHERE HotelId = @HotelId

data.name: HotelReservations_Insert
HotelReservations_Update
data.value: UPDATE HotelReservation SET HotelId = @HotelId, UserId = @UserId, RoomId = @RoomId, CheckIn = @CheckIn, CheckOut = @CheckOut, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelReservations_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelReservation WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Currencies_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, Name, Code FROM Currencies

data.name: Currencies_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, Name, Code FROM Currencies WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Currencies_Insert
Currencies_Update
data.value: UPDATE Currencies SET Name = @Name, Code = @Code WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Currencies_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM Currencies WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelPayments_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, UserId, RoomId, CurrencyId, Amount, CreatedAt FROM HotelPayments

data.name: HotelPayments_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, UserId, RoomId, CurrencyId, Amount, CreatedAt FROM HotelPayments WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelPayments_SelectByUserId
data.value: SELECT Id, UserId, RoomId, CurrencyId, Amount, CreatedAt FROM HotelPayments WHERE UserId = @UserId

data.name: HotelPayments_Insert
HotelPayments_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelPayments WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Ratings_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, Disabled, Rating, CreatedAt FROM Ratings

data.name: Ratings_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, Disabled, Rating, CreatedAt FROM Ratings WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Ratings_Insert
Ratings_Update
data.value: UPDATE Ratings SET Disabled = @Disabled, Rating = @Rating WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Ratings_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM Ratings WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRatings_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, RatingId FROM HotelRatings

data.name: HotelRatings_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, RatingId FROM HotelRatings WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRatings_SelectByHotelId
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, RatingId FROM HotelRatings WHERE HotelId = @HotelId

data.name: HotelRatings_Insert
HotelRatings_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelRatings WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRatings_DeleteByHotelAndRating
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelRatings WHERE HotelId = @HotelId AND RatingId = @RatingId

data.name: Comments_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, Comment, UserId, Disabled, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Comments

data.name: Comments_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, Comment, UserId, Disabled, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Comments WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Comments_SelectByUserId
data.value: SELECT Id, Comment, UserId, Disabled, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Comments WHERE UserId = @UserId

data.name: Comments_Insert
Comments_Update
data.value: UPDATE Comments SET Comment = @Comment, UserId = @UserId, Disabled = @Disabled, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Comments_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM Comments WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelComments_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, CommentId FROM HotelComments

data.name: HotelComments_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, CommentId FROM HotelComments WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelComments_SelectByHotelId
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, CommentId FROM HotelComments WHERE HotelId = @HotelId

data.name: HotelComments_Insert
HotelComments_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelComments WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelComments_DeleteByHotelAndComment
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelComments WHERE HotelId = @HotelId AND CommentId = @CommentId

data.name: RentalCars_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, Brand, Model, Kilometers FROM RentalCars

data.name: RentalCars_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, Brand, Model, Kilometers FROM RentalCars WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: RentalCars_Insert
RentalCars_Update
data.value: UPDATE RentalCars SET Brand = @Brand, Model = @Model, Kilometers = @Kilometers WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: RentalCars_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM RentalCars WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRentalCars_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, RentalCarId FROM HotelRentalCars

data.name: HotelRentalCars_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, RentalCarId FROM HotelRentalCars WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRentalCars_SelectByHotelId
data.value: SELECT Id, HotelId, RentalCarId FROM HotelRentalCars WHERE HotelId = @HotelId

data.name: HotelRentalCars_Insert
HotelRentalCars_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelRentalCars WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelRentalCars_DeleteByHotelAndRentalCar
data.value: DELETE FROM HotelRentalCars WHERE HotelId = @HotelId AND RentalCarId = @RentalCarId

data.name: RentalCarReservations_SelectAll
data.value:
SELECT res.[Id], res.[UseFrom], res.[UseTo],
c.[Id] AS CarId, c.[Brand], c.[Model], c.[Kilometers],
u.[Id] AS UserId, u.[Email], u.[FirstName], u.[LastName]
FROM [RentalCarReservation] res INNER JOIN [RentalCars] c ON res.[CarID] = c.[Id] INNER JOIN [Users] u ON res.[UserID] = u.[Id];

data.name: RentalCarReservations_SelectById
data.value:
SELECT res.[Id], res.[UseFrom], res.[UseTo],
c.[Id] AS CarId, c.[Brand], c.[Model], c.[Kilometers],
u.[Id] AS UserId, u.[Email], u.[FirstName], u.[LastName]
FROM [RentalCarReservation] res INNER JOIN [RentalCars] c ON res.[CarID] = c.[Id] INNER JOIN [Users] u ON res.[UserID] = u.[Id]
WHERE res.[Id] = @Id
data.comment: Get all rental car reservations by reservation ID

data.name: RentalCarReservations_SelectByUserId
data.value:
SELECT res.[Id], res.[UseFrom], res.[UseTo],
c.[Id] AS CarId, c.[Brand], c.[Model], c.[Kilometers],
u.[Id] AS UserId, u.[Email], u.[FirstName], u.[LastName]
FROM [RentalCarReservation] res INNER JOIN [RentalCars] c ON res.[CarID] = c.[Id] INNER JOIN [Users] u ON res.[UserID] = u.[Id]
WHERE u.[Id] = @Id

data.name: RentalCarReservations_Insert
RentalCarReservations_Update
data.value: UPDATE RentalCarReservation SET UserId = @UserId, CarId = @CarId, UseFrom = @UseFrom, UseTo = @UseTo, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: RentalCarReservations_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM RentalCarReservation WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiCompanies_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, Name, Country, City, Street, PostalCode, PhoneNumber, Email, Status, Approved, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM TaxiCompany

data.name: TaxiCompanies_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, Name, Country, City, Street, PostalCode, PhoneNumber, Email, Status, Approved, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM TaxiCompany WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiCompanies_Insert
TaxiCompanies_Update
data.value: UPDATE TaxiCompany SET Name = @Name, Country = @Country, City = @City, Street = @Street, PostalCode = @PostalCode, PhoneNumber = @PhoneNumber, Email = @Email, Status = @Status, Approved = @Approved, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiCompanies_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM TaxiCompany WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiReservations_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, TaxiCompanyId, UserId, PickupAddress, DestinationAddress, Time, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM TaxiReservation

data.name: TaxiReservations_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, TaxiCompanyId, UserId, PickupAddress, DestinationAddress, Time, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM TaxiReservation WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiReservations_SelectByUserId
data.value: SELECT Id, TaxiCompanyId, UserId, PickupAddress, DestinationAddress, Time, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM TaxiReservation WHERE UserId = @UserId

data.name: TaxiReservations_Insert
TaxiReservations_Update
data.value: UPDATE TaxiReservation SET TaxiCompanyId = @TaxiCompanyId, UserId = @UserId, PickupAddress = @PickupAddress, DestinationAddress = @DestinationAddress, Time = @Time, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiReservations_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM TaxiReservation WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiCompanyRatings_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, TaxiCompanyId, RatingId FROM TaxiCompanyRatings

data.name: TaxiCompanyRatings_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, TaxiCompanyId, RatingId FROM TaxiCompanyRatings WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiCompanyRatings_SelectByTaxiCompanyId
data.value: SELECT Id, TaxiCompanyId, RatingId FROM TaxiCompanyRatings WHERE TaxiCompanyId = @TaxiCompanyId

data.name: TaxiCompanyRatings_Insert
TaxiCompanyRatings_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM TaxiCompanyRatings WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiCompanyRatings_DeleteByTaxiCompanyAndRating
data.value: DELETE FROM TaxiCompanyRatings WHERE TaxiCompanyId = @TaxiCompanyId AND RatingId = @RatingId

data.name: TaxiCompanyComments_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, TaxiCompanyId, CommentId FROM TaxiCompanyComments

data.name: TaxiCompanyComments_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, TaxiCompanyId, CommentId FROM TaxiCompanyComments WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiCompanyComments_SelectByTaxiCompanyId
data.value: SELECT Id, TaxiCompanyId, CommentId FROM TaxiCompanyComments WHERE TaxiCompanyId = @TaxiCompanyId

data.name: TaxiCompanyComments_Insert
TaxiCompanyComments_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM TaxiCompanyComments WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: TaxiCompanyComments_DeleteByTaxiCompanyAndComment
data.value: DELETE FROM TaxiCompanyComments WHERE TaxiCompanyId = @TaxiCompanyId AND CommentId = @CommentId

data.name: AIRecommendations_SelectAll
data.value: SELECT Id, Prompt, Reply, PromptedUserId FROM AIRecommendations

data.name: AIRecommendations_SelectById
data.value: SELECT Id, Prompt, Reply, PromptedUserId FROM AIRecommendations WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: AIRecommendations_SelectByUserId
data.value: SELECT Id, Prompt, Reply, PromptedUserId FROM AIRecommendations WHERE PromptedUserId = @PromptedUserId

data.name: AIRecommendations_Insert
AIRecommendations_Update
data.value: UPDATE AIRecommendations SET Prompt = @Prompt, Reply = @Reply, PromptedUserId = @PromptedUserId WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: AIRecommendations_Delete
data.value: DELETE FROM AIRecommendations WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: HotelReservations_SelectAll
data.value:
SELECT res.[Id], res.[CheckIn], res.[CheckOut],
h.[Id] AS HotelId, h.[Name], h.[Country], h.[City], h.[Street], h.[PostalCode], h.[PhoneNumber], h.[Email],
u.[Id] AS UserId, u.[Email], u.[FirstName], u.[LastName],
rm.[Id] AS RoomId, rm.[Description], rm.[Price], rm.[RoomNo], rm.[Floor], rm.[BedCount], rm.[Capacity]
FROM [HotelReservation] res INNER JOIN [Hotels] h ON res.[HotelID] = h.[Id] INNER JOIN [Users] u ON res.[UserID] = u.[Id] INNER JOIN [HotelRooms] rm ON res.[RoomID] = rm.[Id];

data.name: Hotels_SelecyByCoutryName
data.value: SELECT Id, Name, Country, City, Street, PostalCode, PhoneNumber, Email, Status, Approved, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Hotels WHERE Country = @Country

data.name: Hotels_SelectByEmail
data.value: SELECT Id, Name, Country, City, Street, PostalCode, PhoneNumber, Email, Status, Approved, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Hotels WHERE Email = @Email

data.name: Hotels_CheckHotelStatus
data.value: SELECT Status FROM Hotels WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Hotels_UpdateHotelStatus
data.value:
UPDATE Hotels SET Status = 1
WHERE Id = @Id

data.name: Users_SelectUserByEmail
data.value: SELECT Id, Email, FirstName, LastName, LoyaltyPoints, AvatarURL, PasswordHash, MFAType, TFASecret, IsVerified, Status, RoleId, LastLoginAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Users WHERE Email = @Email

data.name: Users_SelectByRoleId
data.value: SELECT Id, Email, FirstName, LastName, LoyaltyPoints, AvatarURL, PasswordHash, MFAType, TFASecret, IsVerified, Status, RoleId, LastLoginAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Users WHERE RoleId = @RoleId

data.name: Users_SelectByStatus
data.value: SELECT Id, Email, FirstName, LastName, LoyaltyPoints, AvatarURL, PasswordHash, MFAType, TFASecret, IsVerified, Status, RoleId, LastLoginAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt FROM Users WHERE Status = @Status

data.name: Users_UpdateStatus
data.value: UPDATE Users SET Status = @Status, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @UserId

data.name: Users_UpdateVerification
data.value: UPDATE Users SET IsVerified = @IsVerified, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt WHERE Id = @UserId

data.name: TaxiReservations_SelectAllWithUserName
data.value: SELECT tr.Id, tr.TaxiCompanyId, c.Name AS TaxiCompanyName, c.PhoneNumber AS TaxiCompanyPhoneNumber, tr.UserId, tr.PickupAddress, tr.DestinationAddress, tr.Time, tr.CreatedAt, tr.UpdatedAt, tr.Status, CONCAT(u.FirstName, ' ', u.LastName) AS UserName FROM TaxiReservation AS tr INNER JOIN Users AS u ON tr.UserId = u.Id INNER JOIN TaxiCompany AS c ON tr.TaxiCompanyId = c.Id;

data.name: TaxiReservations_SelectByUserIdWithUserName
data.value: SELECT tr.Id, tr.TaxiCompanyId, c.Name AS TaxiCompanyName, c.PhoneNumber AS TaxiCompanyPhoneNumber, tr.UserId, tr.PickupAddress, tr.DestinationAddress, tr.Time, tr.CreatedAt, tr.UpdatedAt, tr.Status, CONCAT(u.FirstName, ' ', u.LastName) AS UserName FROM TaxiReservation AS tr INNER JOIN Users AS u ON tr.UserId = u.Id INNER JOIN TaxiCompany AS c ON tr.TaxiCompanyId = c.Id WHERE tr.UserId = @UserId

data.name: TaxiReservations_InsertSimple
TaxiReservations_UpdateSimple
data.value: UPDATE TaxiReservation SET TaxiCompanyId = @TaxiCompanyId, PickupAddress = @PickupAddress, DestinationAddress = @DestinationAddress, Time = @Time, UpdatedAt = @UpdatedAt, Status = @Status WHERE Id = @Id
